purpose: Defines language and encoding admission gates for taskpack registration.

criteria.pass_logic: Manifest contains language policy and Officio-routed owner runtime lane.
criteria.warn_logic: Policy exists but legacy wording needs cleanup.
criteria.block_logic: Language policy missing or owner lane bypasses Officio.

criteria.pass_logic: Root files are UTF-8 no BOM and contain no Cyrillic, replacement char, or mojibake signature.
criteria.warn_logic: Legacy warning-only mode is explicit without clean pass claim.
criteria.block_logic: Any guarded violation appears in root intake files.
criteria.remediation_path: Repair root files and re-run registration.

criteria.pass_logic: Receipt records language gate status and caps.
criteria.warn_logic: Receipt includes status with partial detail only.
criteria.block_logic: Receipt omits language gate status while admitting taskpack.
criteria.remediation_path: Restore receipt schema fields and rerun intake.

next_action: Use matrix in intake fixture suite and resolver checks.
